goal: Add unit tests for new auth components (JwtService, AuthService, MeController, UserAdminController)

tasks.name: Unit tests for JwtService
tasks.action: Create JwtServiceTest with @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class). Test: generateAccessToken returns valid JWT with correct claims (sub, userId, email, roles, authorities, iss, exp); generateRefreshToken returns 64-char hex string; getJwtDecoder can decode tokens generated by generateAccessToken; token with expired time is rejected; ephemeral key fallback works when no RSA config provided.

tasks.name: Unit tests for AuthService
tasks.action: Create AuthServiceTest with @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class). Mock: UserAccountRepository, RefreshTokenRepository, JwtService, PasswordEncoder. Test: authenticate success returns tokens; authenticate with wrong password throws BadCredentialsException; authenticate with disabled account throws DisabledException; authenticate with locked account throws LockedException; refreshAccessToken success rotates token; refreshAccessToken with expired/revoked token throws; refreshAccessToken with unknown token throws.

tasks.name: Unit tests for MeController and UserAdminController
tasks.action: Create MeControllerTest with @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class). Mock UserAccountRepository, MemberRepository. Test: getCurrentUser returns user with member info; getCurrentUser returns user without member; getCurrentUser with unknown user returns 404. Create UserAdminControllerTest with @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class). Mock UserManagementService, PasswordResetService. Test: createUser returns 201 with user details; createUser triggers password reset email when flag set; triggerPasswordReset calls service correctly.

commitMessage: test(auth-hardening): add unit tests for JwtService, AuthService, MeController, UserAdminController
